description_long: This object consists of three milkshake cups, each filled with a thick, slushy beverage in vibrant colors: blue, purple, and red. The cups are made of translucent plastic, allowing the color of the drinks to show through, and each is topped with a matching dome lid. Each milkshake has a straw inserted through the lid, with the straws colored red, blue, and yellow, corresponding to the drink colors. The surface of the drinks appears slightly textured, suggesting a frozen or blended consistency. The cups are arranged closely together, giving a sense of a group order, as might be found at a street food stall or urban café. No branding or logos are visible on the cups or lids.
description: Three colorful milkshake cups with dome lids and straws, filled with blue, purple, and red slushy drinks. The cups are translucent plastic and unbranded.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three milkshake cups side by side, with blue, purple, and red drinks and their matching straws clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled view from the left, highlighting the red milkshake cup in the foreground and the blue and purple cups partially behind.
description_view_2: Rear view with the red cup on the left, purple in the center, and blue on the right, all straws and dome lids visible.
description_view_3: Angled view from the right, focusing on the blue milkshake cup in the foreground, with the red and purple cups behind.
